items.title: Looking At The Narrative For Warby Parker After Shifting Growth And Valuation Expectations
items.description: The fair value estimate for Warby Parker has moved from US$22.45 to US$26.83, a shift that lines up with analysts reassessing how the story around growth and execution is playing out. Supportive voices are pointing to stronger than expected Q3 adjusted EBITDA and a reaffirmed full year EBITDA outlook as signs that management is keeping a tight grip on profitability and costs, even as revenue expectations reset. As some analysts lean more bullish and others stay cautious, it is worth keeping...

items.title: 2 siblings shaping Goldman Sachs share how they rose to the top
items.description: They sit at the top of one of Wall Street's most prestigious banks at a pivotal moment in its history. Inside Padi and Neema Raphael's rise.

items.title: S&P 500 is little changed, rallying back from session lows despite Powell probe, bank sell-off: Live updates
items.description: Stocks were rattle initially after the Department of Justice opened a criminal investigation into Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell.

items.title: Earnings Kickoff, CPI and Other Can't Miss Items this Week
items.description: Markets enter a massive week marking the unofficial start of Q4 earnings season with major financial institutions including JPMorgan, Bank of America, and Goldman Sachs reporting results.
